# Azure ADR Skill (Minimal)

**When to Use** — Document architectural decisions after Steps 2, 3, 5, or 7.

**Output & Naming** — Design ADRs use `03-des-adr-NNNN-` prefix; as-built use `07-ab-adr-NNNN-`.

**Template Sections** — Status, Context, Decision, CAF area, Alternatives (≥2), WAF 5-pillar analysis, Consequences, Security Baseline Impact.

**Common Topics** — Network topology, identity strategy, governance, security tooling, IaC framework choice.

**Quality Checklist** — Sequential numbering, ≥2 alternatives, all 5 WAF pillars, CAF mapping, security baseline impact.

Read `SKILL.md` or `SKILL.digest.md` for full content.
